target: 9. The Island's Hero

(Just be careful…
Trying to buy time…)
(I need to think of a way to break this situation)
Have you made up your mind?
Ugh…!
No matter what, you're going to take us down here, aren't you?

Shinpai's in trouble.
It's because you meddle in things you shouldn't.
Meddling in things…!

Hey… who the hell are you!?
How many of you are there!?

You're going to kill everyone on the island,
and pretend to be them?

Shut up.
You don't need to say that.
That kind of thing…
I won't let you do that, you idiot!!!
Totsumura-san…!?

I'm the hero of justice!
I won't let you do whatever you want!

I'm the town's police officer!
I'll protect the peace of Hitogashima Island!

No matter what monster I face!
The hero of justice will never lose!!!
What…!?
(Seemed like the bullet hit him…)
(I ducked instinctively, so I can't see clearly…)
(Those guys… what happened to the Shadows!?)
Hah… hah… hah…

I did it…
I did it, Shinpai-kun!

I defeated the fake!
The real me defeated my own fake!
Totsumura-san…

(Seemed like the first shot hit him, but
the second only grazed the Shadow's leg…)

(No sign of the Shadow Totsumura, but
maybe I actually defeated him?)

(The Shadow Mio wasn't even affected
by the bullet…)

What are you doing, Tetsu?
You're really an idiot.

Put your hands up!
Mio… no, the fake Mio
can't come here!
Surrender already!

Ugh, this is the worst.
Everything's gone wrong.

How long are you going to be so calm!?
I'm serious!

I'll shoot for real!
You think that's okay!?

Because of you, the rumors about us
spread all over. We needed you to explain
that it was all a lie to the people.

Hey, Tetsu.
Tell the Shadow Tetsu
that it was all a lie.

Are you crazy!?
I'm not saying that!

I see.
Well, it's fine.
If someone's a bother to you, just kill them.

Tetsu, Shinpai,
everyone who knows about us,
and the police from the mainland
who'll arrive first.

Kill them all.
That'll solve everything.
You want to kill everyone!?
It's my punishment for killing that fake!

That's right.
You made things worse.

If I had killed the police from the mainland
it would have been better.
So that's why…!

This… because of me, everyone on the island…
It can't be…

Totsumura-san! Stay focused!
It's not too late to give up!
Eh…?

That one!
If you destroy this Shadow that looks just like Mio
right now, it'll be over!

Then no more damage will happen!
We can save everyone!

You have some spirit.
But how are you going to kill me?

I was hit in the chest earlier.
Where will you shoot next?
Shinpai-kun…
(Even shooting the chest didn't affect the Shadow Mio)
(But for some reason, I was able to defeat the Shadow Totsumura)

(Watch out!
There must be a weakness… if you hit that, it'll work!)

Totsumura-san!
Where did the two bullets you shot hit the Shadow!?
Eh, um… One hit the ground…
The other hit the head!
(The head… right, the head…)
How many bullets are left?

Eh, um… The revolver has five rounds,
and I've already fired four…
Just one left…

Totsumura-san, I'll take the hit
to stop its movements.

While that happens, shoot its head accurately.
The Shadow's weakness is probably the head!
Oh… right.

Wait! Hold on!
If I mess up, what am I supposed to do!?

A headshot…
You can't just do that easily!

Please… do your best!
This is the decisive moment!

Have we finished talking?
I've given you enough time.
Ah, yeah…

Shinpai-kun.
That plan… it's not going to work.
Huh…?
I'll go instead of you!

If I get close to that monster…
It's the elder's job to do that!
Totsumura-san…!

Is it because you're the elder… or
because you're the island's hero?
Haha… Yeah, that's it.
Then, I'm counting on you. Take care of this.

(This real gun… I've never held one before.
It's heavier than I thought)
(Now I'm going to…)
Then, it's about time…

I won't let you!
Uwaaaaa!!!
(Totsumura-san went in…)
(Then I should…)
Got you!

What's wrong, Tetsu?
You're hugging my leg, that's harassment.

Hurry up!
Hurry and shoot, Shinpai-kun!
Yes!!!
(Curses, but the Shadow Mio is moving…)
This is annoying.
Guh!
Totsumura-san!
I'm uncomfortable. Get off me!
Guh, gah!
(Why, why can it just kill people so calmly…)
(What the hell are the Shadows…?)
Shinpai-kun…
Hurry… hurry…
Damn it!!!
Did you… did you do it!?
Totsumura-san!!!
Guh… Shinpai-kun… it worked…
Yes… yes…

I'm okay…
The hero of justice… won't die…
Totsumura-san…

Hey… Shinpai-kun…
Did I protect everyone on the island…
I think so…

Erika… chan…
Will she praise me?

She'll definitely praise you!
So… so… please keep going…
…Tell Erika-chan…

Totsumura… 
I did everything I could for the island…
You tell her yourself!
I want to, but I don't think I can…
Totsumura-san!
I'm counting on you… Shinpei, k…
Totsumura-san…? Totsumura-san?!
Totsumura-saaan!!
Shouting like that's pointless.

Don't you get it?
That person's already dead.
Y-you…!
(That guy… is still alive!?)
(His head… wasn't the Shadow's weakness!?)

Too bad, Shin-chan.
You should've paid more attention to the hints.
(Wh-what's going on…?)

Alright, it's over.
This time, accept your fate, okay?
…I see.

(Even if I'm killed…
If things go well, I can go back in time
and try again)

(Then…)
This time, I'll accept it.
Just do it quickly.

Now that I've accepted it…
Do it.

That's a good attitude.
See you later.
…Ah.
Yeah… yeah…

Wait, you can't kill me?
Yeah, yeah…
(Who is she talking to…?)

Who are you talking to?
Are you going to kill me?
You can't kill me, you know.
…Huh?

Shin-chan, you can go back in time
even if you die, right?
(Why… does she know that…?)
So there's no punishment for you, Shin-chan.

(There's gotta be something…
Some way to kill her…)

(I've got it!
That knife she dropped earlier…)
U-uhhhhhhhhh!!
You okay?
Ah… ahhhh…!

(The wound from that deep stab…
It's already gone…!?)
I've got you…
Guh…?!
S-stop! Let go…!

Ugh, stop flailing around.
No matter how you resist, it's pointless.
What are you going to do with me?
I'm taking you to Mom's.
(…Mom…)

Shin-chan, you need to stay alive
for Mom's sake.
Well, let's go, Shin-chan.
Hey, just one thing.
What?
How do you kill you guys?
The way to kill us?
That's obvious, isn't it?
It's a secret even from Shin-chan.
KEY TIPS [Route: Tetsu Totsumura] acquired.
